name: Mrs. Field's Cinnamon Sugar Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon for topping. Set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
4. In a large bowl, blend the sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add the softened butter and mix to form a grainy paste. Scrape sides of the bowl.
6. Add eggs and vanilla extract. Mix at medium speed until light and fluffy.
7. Add the flour mixture and blend at low speed just until combined. Do not overmix.
8. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and roll each ball in cinnamon-sugar topping.
9. Place cookies on ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 18-20 minutes.
11. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
